name: Mandarake Inc.
summary: Mandarake Inc. manages old books and antique stores in Japan. The company provides comics/light novels, books, magazines, toys, dolls, doujins, disks/games, idols/voice actors, cards/stickers, anime cels/scripts, illustration signed books, art, and other products. It also edits and sells in-house publications. In addition, the company sells its products online. Mandarake Inc. was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
